message:
fix(overlays): clear loading state on cache hit/early return in 12 overlays

Fixes stuck spinner bug when overlay fetches sequence from cache
or early-returns due to missing repo/phage. Affected overlays:
- BiasDecompositionOverlay
- RepeatsOverlay
- PromoterOverlay
- GCSkewOverlay
- BendabilityOverlay
- GelOverlay
- PhasePortraitOverlay
- ComplexityOverlay
- CodonBiasOverlay
- NonBDNAOverlay
- DotPlotOverlay
- HGTOverlay

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
